detail.description:
You open your eyes and find yourself transported to the SNK fighting game world. Here, powerful fighters abound, destinies intertwine, and you return with memories of your past life. Collect fragments to repair the rift in time and space, rewriting the entire fighting legend!

Destiny returns, begin your new "fist" life!

Officially licensed by SNK, the classic fighting game world is fully recreated. You unexpectedly fall into South Town, encountering all-star fighters like Kyo Kusanagi, Iori Ya
